Fotoğraflarla Galata

Sport

Istanbul Galata University supports our students to be successful in both academic and sports fields. There are clubs and teams operating in various sports branches at our university. By joining these clubs, our students have the opportunity to reinforce team spirit and develop leadership skills. Thanks to the sports events and tournaments organized by our university, our students have the opportunity to play sports in a competitive and fun environment. In addition, the vision of our University

To be an internationally respected, academically and professionally competent, innovative and free-thinking institution with a high quality team spirit, participatory and strong sports science field.

Various Sports Clubs and Teams: At our university, there are various sports clubs and teams where our students can participate in the sports they are interested in. These clubs allow students to reinforce team spirit and develop leadership skills.

Regular Sports Events and Tournaments: Our university regularly organizes sports events and tournaments throughout the year. Thanks to these events, our students have the opportunity to play sports in a competitive and fun environment.

Sports Facilities and Infrastructure: Our modern and well-equipped sports facilities provide the necessary facilities for our students to train and participate in sports activities. These facilities help them maintain their physical health and develop their sports skills.

Sports Nutrition and Health Services: Our university provides guidance to students on sports nutrition and health services. Our nutritionists and health professionals support students to maximize their sports performance.

Raising Qualified Sports Science Personnel and Managers: Our students are provided with the opportunity to gain knowledge and experience in the field of Sports Sciences and Sports Science and progress towards becoming qualified sports scientists and managers. By acquiring the necessary equipment in this field, they can take important positions in the sports industry.
